flow: A-import (Claude-Code Blender re-proportion of the cleaned Tripo pod -> conformant FBX -> AIK UE import/swap)
summary: RE-PROPORTIONED loadout pod: the cleaned Tripo capsule enlarged (uniform 1.286x, design preserved -- NOT re-modeled) 210cm -> 270cm tall so the 1.8m robot stands COMFORTABLY inside with headroom + side clearance (was too snug at 210cm). SUPERSEDES pending/20260709-podcapsule-clean (snug) AND pending/20260709-loadoutpod (authored placeholder). This is the pod AIK swaps into AAFLLoadoutPod.

material_bind.slot1: AIK assigns a TRANSPARENT IRONICS neon-glass UE material to slot1 (glass shell, robot visible inside, #1E5AFF emissive rim); slot0 = base band

warnings: Uniform scale-up (design preserved, not distorted). Glass shell needs a TRANSPARENT neon-glass UE material so the robot inside is visible.
audit.report: SM_AFL_LoadoutPod: 8,880 tris / 10,385 verts (poly UNCHANGED from the clean pass -- not re-inflated). Bbox 191 x 217.3 x 270 cm (was 148.6 x 169 x 210). ROBOT FIT (1.8m): occupies 66.7% vertically, 57.6cm headroom (21.3% -- the halo-ring space), 32.4cm base below, 63cm width clearance each side (arms clear). 2 material slots (7,845 neon shell), 1 UV layer preserved, base-center origin, transform clean (loc0/rot0/scale1), metre scale. FBX 553,356 bytes, re-import round-trip valid (FBX 7400).
